narrative:
Swancreek Liberty Center (precinct in Fulton County) has 860 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.6 percentage points.
